components.value: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt)

description.value: This spell gives you a +10 foot enhancement bonus to your base speed. It has no effect on other modes of movement, such as burrow, climb, fly, or swim. Longstrider, Greater This functions as longstrider, except it gives you a +20-foot enhancement bonus to your base speed and a +10-foot enhancement bonus to your other modes of movement ( burrow, climb, fly, swim, and so on). It does not affect movement modes you do not actually haveâfor example, if you do not have a swim speed, this spell does not grant you a swim speed.
